items.title: 通义千问关联公司增资至2亿元
items.summary: 36氪获悉，爱企查App显示，近日，通义千问关联公司通义云启（杭州）信息技术有限公司发生工商变更，新增杭州通义实验室科技有限公司为股东，同时，注册资本由1亿元人民币增至2亿元人民币，增幅100%。 该公司成立于2018年11月，法定代表人为于文渊，经营范围包括广告制作、计算机软硬件及辅助设备批发、电子产品销售等，现由阿里云计算有限公司及上述新增股东共同持股。

items.title_en: Tongyi Qianwen affiliated companies increase capital to 200 million yuan
items.summary_en: 36Kr learned that the Aiqicha App showed that recently, Tongyi Yunqi (Hangzhou) Information Technology Co., Ltd., an affiliated company of Tongyi Qianwen, has undergone industrial and commercial changes, and Hangzhou Tongyi Laboratory Technology Co., Ltd. has been added as a shareholder. At the same time, the registered capital has increased from 100 million yuan to 200 million yuan, an increase of 100%. The company was established in November 2018. Its legal representative is Yu Wenyuan. Its business scope includes advertising production, computer software, hardware and auxiliary equipment wholesale, electronic product sales, etc. It is currently jointly held by Alibaba Cloud Computing Co., Ltd. and the above-mentioned new shareholders.

items.title: “加速进化”完成近10亿元融资
items.summary: 36氪获悉，具身智能公司“加速进化”于近日完成近10亿元融资。本轮融资由北京高精尖产业基金、京国盛基金与华控基金联合领投，联想之星、国海创新资本、交银资本参与投资，深创投、源码资本、英诺基金、IDG等老股东持续加码。本轮融资将用于全球化交付网络建设、具身模型算法开发、机器人产品迭代升级。

items.title_en: "Accelerate Evolution" completed nearly 1 billion yuan in financing
items.summary_en: 36Kr learned that the embodied intelligence company “Accelerated Evolution” recently completed nearly 1 billion yuan in financing. This round of financing was jointly led by Beijing Advanced Industrial Fund, Jingguosheng Fund and Huakong Fund. Legend Star, Guohai Innovation Capital, and Bank of Communications Capital participated in the investment. Old shareholders such as Shenzhen Venture Capital, Source Code Capital, Inno Fund, and IDG continued to increase their investment. This round of financing will be used for global delivery network construction, embodied model algorithm development, and iterative upgrade of robot products.

items.title_en: Tesla is recruiting engineers in Taiwan: experience in advanced process chips is required
items.summary_en: According to recruitment information on Tesla's website, the company is recruiting a group of semiconductor engineers in Taiwan, China, to participate in its "Terafab" artificial intelligence chip project. The engineering positions posted by Tesla in Taiwan cover multiple core front-end manufacturing steps, including photolithography, etching, thin film fabrication and chemical mechanical polishing, as well as yield engineering and process integration. According to the job requirements, several positions require candidates to have "experience in advanced chip manufacturing nodes below 7 nanometers and 2 nanometer technology." Currently, Musk is speeding up preparations for the Terafab semiconductor project. Informed…

items.summary_en: "Punggol" is a new district located in the northeast of Singapore. It has a cute Chinese name: "Punggol", which sounds like the sound of some kind of animal. Punggol is actually a Malay word. Translated, it means hitting a fruit tree with a wooden stick to knock down the fruit. In reality, Punggol Town has been covered by large tracts of forest for a long time. When the office towers of Singapore's Orchard Road were rising one after another, Punggol was still a wild land. items.title_en: NVIDIA Jensen Huang: AI is not a nuclear weapon and will not take away all jobs
items.summary_en: IT House reported on April 17 that while appearing on the Dwarkesh Patel podcast, Nvidia CEO Jen-Hsun Huang refuted the AI ​​threat theory and sharply criticized the excessive hype of the AI ​​industry. He believed that AI is not a "nuclear bomb" and will not replace all software engineering jobs. Huang Jen-Hsun clearly opposes comparing AI to nuclear weapons, believing that such scare propaganda will only make the public hostile and fearful of AI, and ultimately harm the United States’ technological competitiveness. items.title: 台积电CEO：全力扩产仍难以满足强劲AI需求
items.summary: 本周四下午，台积电高管在法说会上宣布，预计2026年公司资本支出将接近520亿至560亿美元的区间顶端水平。当被问及支撑这一资本支出的信心来源时，台积电董事长兼CEO魏哲家回答：“答案很简单：需求极为强劲，尤其是高性能计算与人工智能应用。我们全力加速、提前采购设备，但供应依旧紧张，需求持续增长。这就是资本支出指向区间上限的原因。”（财联社）

items.title_en: TSMC CEO: Fully expanding production is still unable to meet strong AI demand
items.summary_en: On Thursday afternoon, TSMC executives announced at a press conference that the company’s capital expenditures in 2026 are expected to be close to the top of the range of US$52 billion to US$56 billion. When asked about the source of confidence to support this capital expenditure, TSMC Chairman and CEO Wei Zhejia replied: "The answer is simple: demand is extremely strong, especially for high-performance computing and artificial intelligence applications. We are fully accelerating and purchasing equipment in advance, but supply is still tight and demand continues to grow. This is why capital expenditures point to the upper limit of the range." (Financial Associated Press)
